title: Tender Australian Lamb Skewers
description: Grassy and crisp Australian dish featuring fenugreek and a sweet glaze, perfect for a post-workout meal, made with raw-friendly ingredients and cooked on a robata-grill.
instructions: Preheat the robata-grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, honey, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika to make the glaze.
Brush the glaze onto the lamb skewers, making sure they are fully coated.
Place the skewers on the robata-grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Sprinkle the chopped fenugreek leaves onto the skewers during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb skewers hot, garnished with additional fenugreek leaves if desired.
